title: Merchant Key Page Finder
description: Find rewards, loyalty, login, gift card, offers, coupon, account, and app pages on merchant websites.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: One or more merchant website URLs to scan.

maxPages.title: Max pages
maxPages.description: Maximum pages to crawl per website.

maxDepth.title: Max depth
maxDepth.description: How many link hops away from the starting URL to explore.

sameDomainOnly.title: Same domain only
sameDomainOnly.description: Only crawl pages on the same domain as the start URL.
